endpoints.description: Batch calculate commissions for a payroll period or invoice set
Generate payout batch for agent and period

events.description: Emitted when a new commission is calculated and created
Emitted when a commission is approved
Emitted when a commission is clawed back
Emitted when a payout batch is approved
Emitted when a payout is marked as paid

flows.name: Calculate Commission
steps: Trigger: invoice paid (source_entity_type=invoice) or subscription payment received
Server finds agent linked to customer or deal

Apply plan formula: if percentage_of_revenue: commission_amount = deal_value * base_rate / 100; if tiered: find tier by cumulative revenue, apply tier.rate; if flat_per_deal: commission_amount = plan.base_rate as flat amount

flows.name: Approve and Payout
steps: Approve individually or in bulk via POST /commissions/:id/approve
Server bundles all approved unpaid commissions for the period
POST /commission-payouts/:id/mark-paid to finalize; commissions.status set to paid
journal_entry_side_effects: DR Commission Expense / CR Commissions Payable on approval
DR Commissions Payable / CR Bank on payment

flows.name: Clawback
steps: If commission was already in a paid payout: generate negative commission to be deducted from next payout

flows.name: Tiered Commission Calculation
steps: Calculate cumulative deal_value for agent within plan period
Find applicable tier based on cumulative value
If tier.flat_amount exists: add flat bonus to commission_amount
Store commission_rate and final commission_amount on Commission record

computed_fields.formula: Server-side: if plan_type=percentage_of_revenue: deal_value * base_rate / 100; if plan_type=tiered: find tier by cumulative revenue, apply tier.rate, optionally add tier.flat_amount; if plan_type=flat_per_deal: plan.base_rate as flat amount
SUM(commissions.commission_amount WHERE payout_id = id AND status != 'voided')
SUM(commissions.commission_amount WHERE agent_id = id AND status NOT IN ['voided','clawed_back'] AND earned_date >= start_of_current_year)
SUM(commissions.commission_amount WHERE agent_id = id AND status = 'approved' AND payout_id IS NULL)

domain_rules.rule: Commission cannot be paid without an approved payout
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate payout exists and status=approved before allowing commissions to transition to paid

domain_rules.rule: Clawback is only possible within clawback_period_days of the earned_date
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate CURRENT_DATE <= commission.clawback_deadline; return 422 if deadline passed
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show ClawbackWarningBadge when approaching deadline; disable Claw Back action after deadline

domain_rules.rule: Payout cannot be approved if it has 0 commissions
domain_rules.api_guard: Validate commission_count > 0 before allowing approval; return 422 otherwise

domain_rules.rule: Agent must have an active commission_plan to have commissions auto-calculated
domain_rules.api_guard: Check agent.commission_plan_id is set and plan is_active = true; return 422 if not
Reject any status transition from voided; return 409
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Hide all action buttons on voided commissions

domain_rules.rule: Same source_entity_id cannot generate duplicate commissions for the same agent

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id

external_entity_refs.name: Invoice
external_entity_refs.description: Invoice that triggered the commission calculation.
